quotes.quote_text: “ I say no more than the truth , and what everybody will say that knows him , ”

context.quote_text: “ Yes , sir ; but I do not know when _ that _ will be . I do not know who is good enough for him . ”
“ It is very much to his credit , I am sure , that you should think so . ”
“ I have never had a cross word from him in my life , and I have known him ever since he was four years old . ”
“ There are very few people of whom so much can be said . You are lucky in having such a master . ”
